title: Safemoon - REKT
relevance_summary: Exploit involving public burn function leading to price manipulation and liquidity drain on BSC

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls burn() function

red_flags: Large quantity of tokens burned from liquidity pool
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls burn() function
summary: Safemoon lost $8.9M due to a public burn() function vulnerability introduced by the deployer address. A hacker exploited this to manipulate the price and drain liquidity. A guard should block any tx calling burn().
